title: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS launch CMO AI Hub powered by Infosys Aster
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the launch of the CMO AI Hub in collaboration with ANA's Global CMO Growth Council and LIONS. The AI-powered platform, developed by Infosys Aster, is built exclusively for members of ANA's Global CMO Growth Council and is intended to support peer-to-peer learning among Chief Marketing Officers through curated research, case studies, executive perspectives, and a secure conversational AI interface. The release positions the hub as part of Infosys's AI-amplified marketing offering, but does not disclose financial terms, expected revenue impact, contract value, or duration.

key_facts.fact: Infosys, in collaboration with ANA's Global CMO Growth Council and LIONS, announced the launch of the CMO AI Hub on June 24, 2026.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS Unveil the CMO AI Hub

key_facts.fact: The CMO AI Hub is an AI-powered platform designed to enable peer-to-peer learning among Chief Marketing Officers by bringing together insights, experiences, and perspectives from leading marketing organizations and executives worldwide.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS Unveil the CMO AI Hub

key_facts.fact: The platform was developed by Infosys Aster, an AI-amplified marketing suite.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS Unveil the CMO AI Hub

key_facts.fact: The hub brings together curated intelligence from ANA, LIONS, and the Infosys Knowledge Institute into a secure, conversational interface tailored for senior marketing leaders.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS Unveil the CMO AI Hub

key_facts.fact: The CMO AI Hub is built exclusively for members of ANA's Global CMO Growth Council.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS Unveil the CMO AI Hub

key_facts.fact: The CMO AI Hub launches alongside the CMO AI Playbook, developed by the Infosys Knowledge Institute based on research including one-on-one interviews with CMOs, engagement with marketing leaders across global industry events, and inputs from ANA members.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS Unveil the CMO AI Hub

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in AI-first business consulting  and  technology  services,  in  collaboration  with  ANA's  Global  CMO  Growth  Council,  global leadership body driving growth for marketers, and LIONS, the parent platform and organizer of the Cannes Lions International Festival of Creativity, today announced the launch of the CMO AI Hub.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS Unveil the CMO AI Hub
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main launch event and identifies the counterparties.

important_text_spans.text: Developed by Infosys Aster, an AI-amplified marketing suite, the hub brings together curated intelligence from Association of National Advertisers (ANA), LIONS, and the Infosys Knowledge Institute, the research arm  of  Infosys,  into  a  secure,  conversational  interface  tailored  for  senior  marketing  leaders.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS Unveil the CMO AI Hub
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the role of Infosys Aster and the platform's core positioning.

important_text_spans.text: Built  exclusively  for  members of ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, the hub transforms the collective intelligence of the marketing industry into an always-available resource.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys, ANA's Global CMO Growth Council, and LIONS Unveil the CMO AI Hub
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the target user base and intended purpose of the CMO AI Hub.
